_comment: Cadence guard for scripts/agent_lock.py preflight (added W204, 2026-07-21).
rationale: The scheduled task cron is mis-set to '0 * * * *' (hourly) instead of '0 2,14 * * *' (02:00/14:00 HKT = 18:00/06:00 UTC). Each firing rebuilds a venv, runs the full verification battery, and emits a near-duplicate status doc and email draft for zero model progress; 11 such firings occurred on 2026-07-21 alone. This guard collapses redundant firings to at most one cycle per min_interval_minutes. 600 (10h) sits below the intended 12h cadence, so a CORRECTLY configured schedule never yields on cadence and the guard becomes an inert backstop.
disable_procedure: Set enabled=false, or pass --ignore-cadence to preflight for a one-off manual run.
fail_open: A missing, unreadable or malformed policy, an absent released_at, or any parse error all resolve to PROCEED. The guard can suppress noise; it must never be able to stall the project.
owner_note: This mitigates the SYMPTOM only. Owner action 1 (correct the cron to '0 2,14 * * *') remains the actual fix.
